raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Nationwide overdoses increased by 18%.",
    "The Covid-19 pandemic has led to a rise in drug and alcohol abuse.",
    "As of June 2020, 13% of Americans reported starting or increasing substance use due to stress related to COVID-19.",
    "More than 40 U.S. states have seen increases in opioid-related mortality.",
    "Minimum insurance coverage is not currently required by state law for substance abuse treatment facilities.",
    "Patients in recovery facilities and residences are at risk due to the lack of minimum insurance coverage requirements.",
    "Commercial insurance coverage available today is more suitable for the risks associated with recovery businesses."
  ]
}
```
